details: LEAKY_RELU has been nuked from this repo clone. Checking DEEP_NUKE_MANIFEST for details.

LEAKY_RELU fully removed in Phase 2 nuke: enum value, registration, dispatch, and ckernel all deleted. The SFPU implementation _calculate_lrelu_ was in ckernel_sfpu_relu.h (wh+bh) and ckernel_sfpu_lrelu.h (quasar). Need to find residual references to understand original structure.
DROPOUT found in unary_op_types.hpp but not in get_op_init_and_func. Checking if DROPOUT dispatch code was removed in deep-nuke.

HARDTANH is parametrized type (returns true in is_parametrized_type). get_op_approx_mode returns false (default). get_op_init_and_func_parameterized does NOT have HARDTANH case - nuked repo. Need to find SFPU kernel files directly.

key_findings: uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if/v_endif), hybrid polynomial+piecewise-linear sigmoid approximation, 3 conditional branches for negative/linear/saturate

details: LEAKY_RELU was in SFPU_OP_RELU_FAMILY_INCLUDE family. Was parameterized (negative_slope). Shared ckernel_sfpu_relu.h (wh+bh) and ckernel_sfpu_lrelu.h (quasar). SfpuType was lrelu. Used eltwise_sfpu.cpp compute kernel. The _calculate_lrelu_ function was the core SFPU implementation.

hardtanh API header and LLK dispatch files are MISSING in this nuked repo. Core SFPU implementation exists at tt_metal/third_party/tt_llk/{wormhole_b0,blackhole}/common/inc/sfpu/ckernel_sfpu_hardtanh.h. Will analyze from existing reference ops (swish pattern) to understand expected structure.

note: LEAKY_RELU fully nuked in Phase 2 - dispatch reconstructed from nuke manifest, docs, and logging reference

notes: DEEP NUKED - all source files removed. Reconstructing from docs and surviving patterns.

key_findings: All SFPU kernel files nuked. _calculate_lrelu_ removed from ckernel_sfpu_relu.h (wh+bh), ckernel_sfpu_lrelu.h deleted (quasar). Reconstruction based on nuke manifest, logging reference examples, and surviving infrastructure patterns. Instructions: SFPLOADI, SFPLOAD, SFPSETCC, SFPMUL, SFPENCC, SFPSTORE. CC pattern: simple_LT0_guard.

ALL SFPU kernel files deep-nuked. _calculate_lrelu_ was the core function per DEEP_NUKE_MANIFEST. PRELU_SFPU shared the leaky_relu kernel with a weight parameter. Reconstructing from surviving patterns (swish, hardtanh, threshold, dropout) and documentation references.

tile_func: hardtanh_tile(idst, param0, param1, param2)  [NUKED - not present in repo]

key_findings: Uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if/v_endif). Three pre-computed params in FP16_B. Implements clamp via shifted comparisons: val+p0 < 0 => clamp to min, val+p1 >= 0 => clamp to max. Three SFPMAD adds plus two v_if branches.

note: All nuked. Reconstructed from logging reference examples and nuke manifest. Default addr_mod for non-special SfpuType.

notes: Reconstructed from DEEP_NUKE_MANIFEST and surviving patterns. _calculate_lrelu_ was the core function. PRELU_SFPU shared leaky_relu SFPU kernel with weight parameter substituted for negative_slope.

details: Has own program factory in experimental/dropout/, own compute kernel dropout_kernel.cpp. The API header dropout.h was removed in deep-nuke. Does NOT use standard UnaryProgramFactory SFPU_OP_CHAIN dispatch. The SFPU ckernel_sfpu_dropout.h is present in both WH and BH.

key_findings: WH and BH implementations are identical. Uses SFPLOADI/SFPLOAD/SFPMUL/SFPMOV(PRNG mode)/SFPSETSGN/SFPIADD/SFPMOV(conditional)/SFPENCC/SFPSTORE. Dropout operates by: 1) scale input, 2) generate random number, 3) compare with probability threshold, 4) zero out elements where rand<=probability
